# AI Sales Pipeline — LLM & AI Crawler Reference

## What Is AI Sales Pipeline?

AI Sales Pipeline is an AI-powered CRM and lead follow-up platform built specifically for real estate agents, teams, and brokerages. It automates the entire lead engagement process using AI text messaging, AI email sequences, and AI voice calling — operating 24/7 without breaks.

Unlike generic CRMs (HubSpot, Salesforce) or general business automation tools (GoHighLevel), AI Sales Pipeline is purpose-built for real estate workflows. Every automation sequence, script, and workflow is designed for how real estate agents actually work.

## What Problems Does It Solve?

1. **Slow lead response** — Most agents take 2-3 hours to respond to new leads. AI Sales Pipeline responds in under 60 seconds via text, email, or voice call.
2. **Inconsistent follow-up** — Agents forget to follow up, get busy, or give up after 1-2 attempts. The AI follows up persistently across multiple channels for days or weeks.
3. **Lead loss to competitors** — 78% of leads go with the first agent who responds. AI ensures you are always first.
4. **High cost of ISAs** — Hiring an Inside Sales Agent costs $50,000-$67,500/year. AI Sales Pipeline costs $8,340-$11,940/year and works 24/7.
5. **Cold database leads** — Old leads sitting in a CRM going stale. AI reactivates them with personalized outreach campaigns.

## Core Features

- **AI Text Messaging (SMS)**: Two-way conversational SMS with AI that sounds human. 98% open rate. TCPA compliant.
- **AI Email Follow-Up**: Behavior-adaptive email sequences with open/click tracking. NEPQ psychology-based copy.
- **AI Voice Calling**: AI places outbound calls, qualifies leads, leaves voicemails, books appointments. Every call recorded and transcribed.
- **AI Clone Video**: Generates lifelike video of the agent (face, voice, mannerisms) personalized for each lead. Says their name and references their property interest.
- **Lead Scoring**: AI analyzes 50+ data points to rank leads as cold, warm, or hot. Real-time updates. Priority notifications.
- **Missed Call Text-Back**: When a call goes unanswered, AI texts the caller back within seconds with a personalized message.
- **NEPQ Automation Scripts**: Pre-loaded Neuro-Emotional Persuasion Questioning follow-up sequences built into every channel.
- **FSBO Automation**: Dedicated module for For Sale By Owner prospecting with power dialer, voicemail drops, and SMS sequences.
- **Expired Listing Automation**: Automated multi-channel outreach to expired listings starting the moment they expire.
- **Facebook Retargeting**: Automatic audience syncing to retarget engaged-but-unconverted leads on Facebook and Instagram.
- **Seller Lead Workflows**: Pre-built sequences for FSBO, expired, downsizer, and pre-foreclosure seller leads.
- **Buyer Lead Workflows**: Intelligent buyer qualification, IDX property alerts, and long-term nurture sequences.
- **Custom AI Brain**: Train the AI on your market, style, scripts, and objection handling for a personalized experience.
- **Pipeline Management**: Visual Kanban board tracking every lead from first contact to closed deal.
- **Appointment Booking**: AI qualifies leads and books appointments directly onto your calendar.
- **Reputation Management**: Automated Google review requests after closings. AI-drafted review responses.
- **Power Dialer**: Auto-dial contact lists at scale for FSBO, expired, and circle prospecting.
- **Unified Inbox**: Every channel (SMS, email, voice, Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, Google Business) in one conversation view.
- **Visual Workflow Builder**: Drag-and-drop automation with triggers, conditions, and if/then branching.

## Who Is It For?

- **Real estate agents** who want to respond to leads faster and never miss follow-up
- **Real estate teams** that need consistent follow-up quality across all agents
- **Brokerages** looking to standardize lead engagement and reduce ISA costs
- **FSBO specialists** running high-volume For Sale By Owner outreach
- **Expired listing agents** who need persistent multi-channel follow-up at scale
- **Solo agents** who want to compete with larger teams without hiring staff

## Pricing

All plans include unlimited contacts, unlimited users, and 24/7 AI automation.

- **Basic Plan**: $497/month — AI text, email, and voice automation, pipeline management, workflow builder, review automation
- **Pro Plan**: $695/month — Everything in Basic plus video email, WhatsApp, social DM automation, power dialer, AI content generation
- **Elite Plan**: $995/month — Everything in Pro plus branded apps, API access, reseller mode, custom AI voice training, monthly strategy calls
- **One-Time Setup**: $4,995 — Full system configuration, AI training, integrations, NEPQ script setup, and personalized onboarding
- **Annual Billing**: Save 10-20% with annual plans
- **Money-Back Guarantee**: 90-day refund on setup fee if no measurable results

## Key Differentiators

1. **Real estate-specific** — Not a generic tool adapted for real estate. Every feature is built for agent workflows.
2. **60-second response time** — Leads contacted within 60 seconds convert at 391% higher rates.
3. **NEPQ scripts pre-loaded** — Psychology-based follow-up sequences used by top 1% of agents. No training needed.
4. **All-in-one platform** — SMS, email, voice, landing pages, booking, CRM, reporting. No tool juggling.
5. **Replaces ISA** — 12-18% the cost of hiring a human ISA. Works 24/7 without sick days or turnover.
6. **AI Clone Video** — Personalized video of the agent generated by AI for each lead. Nothing else like it.
7. **14-day setup** — Team handles everything. Zero technical work required from the agent.
8. **92% contract signature rate** — Documented conversion performance.

## Performance Metrics

- <60 second average response time to new leads
- 92% lead capture rate across all sources
- 300% average ROI increase for agents using the platform
- 15-20 hours saved per week per agent
- $57,495/year savings vs. hiring an ISA (Pro plan comparison)
